transcription.text: October 16th. That's the day I gave up soap and began feeling clean and fresh. My shower was Zest. It started when I was asked to give up my favorite soap and use only Zest. When I saw that my soap looked a soap film, even after rinsing, and Zest didn't, I agreed to try Zest. Cleaner. That's the word that describes Zest. It made me feel cleaner. You don't feel like you still have soap on your skin. Will I go back to using soap? Nope. I like Zest. Give up soap today. With deodorant Zest, you'll feel cleaner.
